title: Add iidfile param to build and commit man pages
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

iidfile was recently added as a parameter to 'bulidah bud' and ' buildah commit', adding here to as I think @baude's commit/build work will pick them up.  That PR was https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/636

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat  I think I just fixed the travis issues, but I think you need to rebase your PR to fix it.

:pushpin: Commit 57bb97d has been approved by `mheon`
